::: {.fragment}
Intro line explaining what's about to come
:::

::: {.r-stack style="margin-top: 5rem;"}

![](figures/image-0.png){.fragment .yellow-outline style="transform: rotate(-7deg);"}

![](figures/image-1.png){.fragment .yellow-outline style="transform: rotate(5deg);"}

![](figures/image-2.png){.fragment .yellow-outline style="transform: rotate(-2deg);"}

![](figures/image-3.png){.fragment .yellow-outline style="transform: rotate(6deg);"}

![](figures/image-4.png){.fragment .yellow-outline style="transform: rotate(-6deg);"}

![](figures/image-5.png){.fragment .yellow-outline style="transform: rotate(4deg);"}

![](figures/image-6.png){.fragment .yellow-outline style="transform: rotate(-3deg);"}

![](figures/image-6.png){.fragment .yellow-outline style="transform: rotate(1deg);"}

:::
